+def get_user(conn, user_id: int):
+    return conn.execute("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?", (user_id,)).fetchone()

+from src.users_safe import get_user
+
+def test_get_user_uses_parameterized_query(fake_conn):
+    get_user(fake_conn, 7)
+    assert fake_conn.last_params == (7,)
